privileged_info_summary: The task defines four virtual cameras with tiered recording policies for an Nx Witness VMS system. Entrance Camera is Tier 1 (25 fps, 4096 kbps, high quality), generating 42.19 GB/day. Parking Lot and Lobby cameras are Tier 2 (15 fps, 2048 kbps, normal quality) at 21.09 GB/day each. Server Room Camera is Tier 3 (10 fps, 1024 kbps, low quality) at 10.55 GB/day. Combined daily storage requirement is approximately 94.92 GB. All FPS values are within Nx Witness limits (10-30 fps). Bitrate values are reasonable for video recording. The compliance report must be created at /home/ga/recording_policy_report.txt.
